'''Samish Kash''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who ruled the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Delaluna]] at the time of [[Lorian Nod]]'s [[Death/Legends|death]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Shortly after Kash was elected regent, he led negotiations with [[Lorian Nod]], an envoy of [[Junction V]]. Kash wanted to expel the mistrust between the two worlds and allow free trade and travel which Nod agreed to since the former Jedi wanted to make up for his mistakes that he did from the past. However, during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Separatists had an interest in the major systems in the Mid Rim. Therefore, [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and the other three regents invited Kash to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Null/Legends|Null]], along with bodyguards [[Floria]] and [[Dane (bounty hunter)|Dane]], who were former [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. With Floria, he led a romantic relationship with her.

Before the negotiations began, Kash was nearly [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Robior Web]], who had been hired by Dooku to eliminate Kash and force the Delalunan resistance to join the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Kash was wounded in the attack, but Lorian brought Kash to a local [[Medcenter/Legends|med center]] in time to save his life. After [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] arrived to the rescue with Floria and Dane, and find Dooku, Samish Kash survived from his wounds and joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], bringing Delaluna on the Republic's side. The other regents were not consistent with Dooku and swore their allegiance to the Republic as well.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' {{1st}}
